# Cell cycle heterogeneity and plasticity of colorectal cancer stem cells

## Abstract

This minimized replay fixture paraphrases the 2024 Wiley article into a short offline markdown sample for regression testing.

## Results

Cell-state diversity changes across the colorectal cancer stem-cell population, and the article connects those shifts to
plasticity, treatment response and tumor maintenance. The shortened fixture keeps enough body text to exercise service-level
markdown parsing and source-trail replay without embedding the original publisher page.

## Discussion

The replay sample emphasizes that heterogeneous cycling behavior can support adaptation under stress and may matter for how
future therapeutic strategies target stem-like tumor compartments.
